name: Metro Line 1 (Metropolitan Express)
description: High-capacity subway directly connected to North Concourse (Gate 1). Best option to bypass road traffic.

name: FIFA Tournament Shuttle Bus (Route South)
description: Free shuttle buses routing between South Plaza and downtown fan zones. Expect delays due to heavy roadway traffic.

name: Rideshare Pickup Hub (West Lot D)
description: Uber/Lyft/Taxi dedicated pick-up plaza. High surge rates and traffic queues in surrounding roads.

name: Official Parking Lot B (East)
description: Pre-booked secure parking located 600m East of Gate 2. Accessible shuttles run to Gate 4 every 5 minutes.

name: Bicycle Parking & Micromobility Docks (North & West)
description: Free secure bicycle racks and e-scooter docking areas on North and West perimeter fences. Direct zero-congestion lanes.
